{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":4763},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6921207284249018381","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书很好，主角脾气爆，三观正，不圣母，不花心，见谁怼谁，一点亏不吃，看不惯骂人的，别来看，喜欢爽文，进来你不后悔"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1611469151,"group_id":"6899022172656765966","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个玄幻世界的仙王，一个高武世界的疯子，一个现实世界的小丑","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9iT/BTdFHKOOz/O7vEORjbZpAWi9rZdrV5VTUPR8f9k","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ab9c48745b16450cbd4db46946ae3f93~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622753&x-signature=3wIRPNahi6MGRP60T1aSYP7slPY%3D","user_id":"1011145211906920","user_name":"直追天穹忘追你"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1011145211906920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6899022172656765966","book_info":{"abstract":"无尽宙海世界，人们通过御灵水晶抽取御灵！
尹志重生回抽到最完美、最顶级、世间唯一的女帝的那一天，并激活“找死系统”，越是找死就越强。
本以为抽到一个女帝就耗尽了一辈子的运气，没想到竟然把把抽到的都是女帝？
青炎女帝，青炎燃起，黑夜化昼！
星寒女帝，口吐寒意，天地冰封！
丹医女帝，微微一笑，生死难料！
白蛇女帝，雌姿英发，万兽臣服！
面对一个个女帝御灵，尹志犯愁了：到底该先培养哪一个呢？愁啊！

3,"show_pv":79152},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7059211210130572065","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"番茄里爽文中的爽文，完全无圣母，剧情很新奇，有很大的可读性，都市和系统链接，以现实生活为基础，构建宏大的宇宙观，主角后宫贼大，喜欢后宫多的可以看看，作者部分写作让读者措不及防，对于yellow的描写很是新鲜，这种描写我是第一次看（我各种小说软件加起有阅读3000多小时了），剧情的衔接简直无敌，脑洞很大，推荐！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1643600695,"group_id":"6899022172656765966","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"请放心食用我所推的书籍，全部都是我亲自看过的，精挑细选。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N09cJ5NuP8gUwuETXvHDUsM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0e5fb99da1004baea77ea2ef7ac17153~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624372&x-signature=QutHkX42X3u2AGuqVYi8FQI996U%3D","user_id":"6881364496","user_name":"w漠w"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6881364496","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1718019063,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"689902217265676 本以为抽到一个女帝就耗尽了一辈子的运气，没想到竟然把把抽到的都是女帝？
青炎女帝，青炎燃起，黑夜化昼！
星寒女帝，口吐寒意，天地冰封！
丹医女帝，微微一笑，生死难料！
白蛇女帝，雌姿英发，万兽臣服！
面对一个个女帝御灵，尹志犯愁了：到底该先培养哪一个呢？愁啊！

ly_count":4,"show_pv":7149},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6992493148538684195","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看的小说，男主不圣母该打就打一点不拖沓，有时看得大呼过瘾，有时热泪盈眶，给了我太多感动和精彩。这书让我见证了一个小人物慢慢成长为强者的故事，让我想起了在初二看斗破苍穹的时候，那时候哪有什么系统全靠老爷爷。也不算是爽文改虐的还得虐，但也是成长类型的，看着尹志仿佛就看到了当初的萧炎。我非常推荐这部小说，打心底喜欢。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1628066683,"group_id":"6899022172656765966","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"消息没有99+我都不看","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N64o0QLIo8QVjPVErbhB/7Im4llBynQLc1WXuwzrxhWD","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8d5b3cd1bc214564a8f91d8ea2366841~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615476&x-signature=cl95EVR3OrdqVSGz2DXbNvrWmWo%3D","user_id":"1319834450402798","user_name":"热心助人的马主管"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1319834450402798","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776401779,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"sv
